top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Bike MS: New York City's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
When someone attacks on flat traffic-free urban roads with one, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
50 miles on flat traffic-free urban roads with one burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Bike MS: New York City's flat traffic-free urban roads with one rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Bike MS: New York City's flat traffic-free urban roads with one forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 50 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Bike MS: New York City. Train it until it feels boring.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Bike MS: New York City's flat traffic-free urban roads with one actually does to you.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
2-minute all-out efforts on flat traffic-free urban roads with one. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
At Bike MS: New York City, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Base fitness for Bike MS: New York City. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
76–85% FTP for extended efforts. At Bike MS: New York City, tempo is the floor you'll live on. Make it feel easy.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Bike MS: New York City’s 50 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, VO2max, and Durability to prepare you for 50 miles of flat traffic-free urban roads with one significant climb (50-mile route) in Manhattan, New York City, New York, USA.
